prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信 息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与暨南大学计算机、网络空间安全、电气等招生专业高度契合；本省2026年物理类考生约329025人，较2025年增加约15.5%，竞争明 显加剧；暨南大学位于广东广州，属华南地区热门高校；该校在四川省招生占比约4.3%（2025年），跨省招生比例稳定，地域偏 好对四川考生报考影响中性。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (including physics category) was approximately 12291 → 13386 → 49231 → 24083. In 2024, there was an abnormal gap (ranking plummeted to about 49231), and in 2025 it rebounded significantly to about 24083, with drastic fluctuations in the past two years; the baseline for 2025 is about 24083; the provincial science enrollment plan was 59 from 2022 to 2024, and increased to 75 in 2025 (physics category); the 2026 plan is 76, a slight expansion of 1 person compared to 2025, an increase of about 1.3%, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026, it is approximately 59th, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive university; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 41st (relatively hot), with medium to high short video exposure; no gap signals for Jinan University in Sichuan were found in historical admission anomaly records; Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, among which Journalism and Communication and Business Administration are A-level disciplines, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with Jinan University's enrollment majors like Computer Science, Cyberspace Security, and Electrical Engineering; the number of physics category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 329,025, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a popular university in South China; the university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 4.3% (2025), with stable cross-provincial enrollment proportions, and regional preference has a neutral impact on Sichuan candidates' applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 24083, the 2026 plan only expands by 1 person, the increase of physics category candidates in the province by about 15.5% leading to intensified competition, and the school's reputation being neutral to slightly positive, with strong attractiveness of advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 24076, with a range of 23576–24576.
